post.subject: RAAA!
post.body:
Im sick - im very fucking sick!! 

Too often am I in my room during the day and feeling very cold. 

Too often do i feel extremely tired during the day and occasionally sleep for a while.

Too often am i going out to drink and coming home between Sunday and Tuesday when I have class at 9am the next day.

Im sitting in practical class at the minute wishing that i hadnt gotten up this morning, its just not worth it. I could be getting some more sleep and not be too tired to revise for test i have later - which i really gotta revise for!

And on top of everything, this computer is being really gay and slow. 

Fuck it - im going!
